ddls:
CREATE TABLE "local_authorities" (
  "la_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each local authority */,
  "la_name" TEXT /* Name of the local authority */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the local authority is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the local authority */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the local authority was established */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density (people per square kilometer) */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Total area of the local authority in square kilometers */,
  "official_website" TEXT /* URL of the official website of the local authority */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to this record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("la_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "lower_super_output_areas" (
  "lsoa_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each LSOA */,
  "lsoa_name" TEXT /* Name of the LSOA */,
  "la_code" TEXT /* Reference to the local authority it belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population count for the LSOA */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Total area of the LSOA in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density (people per square kilometer) */,
  "boundary_coordinates" TEXT /* Geospatial coordinates of the LSOA boundary */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to this record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lsoa_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lower_super_output_areas_la_code FOREIGN KEY ("la_code") REFERENCES local_authorities ("la_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "lsoa_code" TEXT /* Reference to the LSOA */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the demographic data */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group represented (e.g., 0-14, 15-64, 65+) */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Total population count for the age group in the LSOA */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of population by gender */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of population by ethnicity */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to this record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_lsoa_code FOREIGN KEY ("lsoa_code") REFERENCES lower_super_output_areas ("lsoa_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "socioeconomic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each socioeconomic record */,
  "lsoa_code" TEXT /* Reference to the LSOA */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the socioeconomic data */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income for the LSOA */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the LSOA */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in poverty */,
  "household_income_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of household income */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to this record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_socioeconomic_indicators_lsoa_code FOREIGN KEY ("lsoa_code") REFERENCES lower_super_output_areas ("lsoa_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_stats" (
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing record */,
  "lsoa_code" TEXT /* Reference to the LSOA */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the housing data */,
  "total_houses" INTEGER /* Total number of houses in the LSOA */,
  "avg_house_price" REAL /* Average house price in the LSOA */,
  "housing_type_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of housing types */,
  "vacancy_rate" REAL /* Percentage of vacant houses */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to this record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_stats_lsoa_code FOREIGN KEY ("lsoa_code") REFERENCES lower_super_output_areas ("lsoa_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "educational_attainment" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educational record */,
  "lsoa_code" TEXT /* Reference to the LSOA */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the educational data */,
  "percentage_high_school" REAL /* Percentage of population with high school education */,
  "percentage_university" REAL /* Percentage of population with university education */,
  "percentage_no_education" REAL /* Percentage of population with no formal education */,
  "percentage_postgraduate" REAL /* Percentage of population with postgraduate education */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to this record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educational_attainment_lsoa_code FOREIGN KEY ("lsoa_code") REFERENCES lower_super_output_areas ("lsoa_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_stats" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "lsoa_code" TEXT /* Reference to the LSOA */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the health data */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy in the LSOA */,
  "percentage_obesity" REAL /* Percentage of the population classified as obese */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Mortality rate per 1,000 residents */,
  "mental_health_prevalence" REAL /* Percentage of population with mental health issues */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to this record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_stats_lsoa_code FOREIGN KEY ("lsoa_code") REFERENCES lower_super_output_areas ("lsoa_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_stats" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime record */,
  "lsoa_code" TEXT /* Reference to the LSOA */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the crime data */,
  "total_crimes" INTEGER /* Total number of crimes recorded in the LSOA */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Rate of crime per 1,000 residents */,
  "crime_type_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of crime types */,
  "reported_crimes" INTEGER /* Number of reported crimes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to this record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_stats_lsoa_code FOREIGN KEY ("lsoa_code") REFERENCES lower_super_output_areas ("lsoa_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "transportation_stats" (
  "transport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transportation record */,
  "lsoa_code" TEXT /* Reference to the LSOA */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the transportation data */,
  "percentage_public_transport" REAL /* Percentage of residents using public transport */,
  "average_commute_time" REAL /* Average commute time in minutes */,
  "public_transport_type_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of public transport types */,
  "private_vehicle_ownership" REAL /* Percentage of residents owning a private vehicle */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to this record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transportation_stats_lsoa_code FOREIGN KEY ("lsoa_code") REFERENCES lower_super_output_areas ("lsoa_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public service record */,
  "lsoa_code" TEXT /* Reference to the LSOA */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of public service (e.g., library, community center) */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Availability of the service (true/false) */,
  "service_location" TEXT /* Location of the public service */,
  "service_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the public service */,
  "service_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the public service */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to this record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_services_lsoa_code FOREIGN KEY ("lsoa_code") REFERENCES lower_super_output_areas ("lsoa_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_stats" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "lsoa_code" TEXT /* Reference to the LSOA */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the employment data */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate in the LSOA */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of employed individuals */,
  "job_sector_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of jobs by sector */,
  "unemployment_duration" REAL /* Average duration of unemployment in months */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to this record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_stats_lsoa_code FOREIGN KEY ("lsoa_code") REFERENCES lower_super_output_areas ("lsoa_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_access ("user_id")
)
